title: 10 best herbal tinctures for jaundice
description: Stinging nettle tinctures helps with jaundice because of its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which aid in reducing liver damage and improving bile flow. The herbal extract contains compounds that have been shown to decrease bilirubin levels in the blood, a common symptom of jaundice. Additionally, nettle's natural choleretic effects help stimulate bile production and release, allowing for more effective removal of toxins from the body and promoting overall liver health an...
